transcription.text: Chili's took the burger you love, made it bigger, now $6.99, this thing's half a pound, $6.99 for an old-timer with cheese, also did we mention it's $6.99, Chili's is back, baby, back, baby, back, oh baby, Chili's is back.

metadata.title: 2017 Chili's Oldtimer With Cheese Bigger Big Mouth Burgers
